brand.name: L'Aura
brand.logo_concept: Stylized metallic gold lips on deep charcoal, sleek and non-cartoonish
brand.tone: Premium, discreet, elegant, modern, not vulgar, not cheap

rules.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl+ font-medium tracking-tighter leading-none text-[#F8F8F8]
rules.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-medium tracking-tight text-[#F8F8F8]
rules.overline: text-xs sm:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-medium text-[#D4AF37]

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Lots of negative space. Asymmetrical grids for editorial feel.

buttons.primary: bg-transparent border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37] hover:text-[#050505] transition-all duration-300 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm py-4 px-8
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-all duration-300 py-3 px-6
buttons.ghost: text-[#A1A1AA] hover:text-[#D4AF37] transition-colors duration-300 underline-offset-4 hover:underline

cards.profile: relative group overflow-hidden bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/5 hover:border-[#D4AF37]/30 transition-all duration-500 rounded-sm hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_10px_40px_-10px_rgba(212,175,55,0.15)]
cards.glass_panel: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0A]/60 border border-white/10 shadow-2xl rounded-sm

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#050505]/80 border-b border-white/5 transition-all duration-300
navigation.links: text-sm uppercase tracking-widest text-[#A1A1AA] hover:text-[#D4AF37] transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-0 text-white transition-colors py-3 px-0 w-full outline-none placeholder:text-zinc-600 rounded-none
inputs.select: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/20 text-white focus:border-[#D4AF37] rounded-none

logos.description: Minimalist luxury stylized lips logo, metallic gold lines on black

hero_backgrounds.description: Cinematic dark charcoal background with subtle curved metallic gold lines
Abstract black and gold paint swirls

portraits.description: Elegant fashion model in a black turtleneck, dark background, gold accents
Black and white portrait of a young woman

textures.description: Abstract elegant golden shimmer on black background
Mesmerizing abstract pattern of swirling black and gold

visual_motifs.lips: Integrate curved, bezier-like lines inspired by lips in section dividers (`rounded-t-[50%]`). Avoid literal lip drawings outside the logo.
visual_motifs.gold_shimmer: Use subtle gold gradients on hover `bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-[#D4AF37]/20 to-transparent` for loaders and button outlines.
visual_motifs.editorial_lines: Use 1px borders colored `white/10` or `gold/10` to divide sections, mimicking high-fashion magazines.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all text is in Russian. 'Home' -> 'Главная', 'Profiles' -> 'Профили', etc.
Install and use 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Manrope' fonts from Google Fonts.
Use Framer Motion for scroll reveals, hero fade + slide up, and smooth page transitions.
Profile cards must have a soft hover lift and a subtle gold glow.
Avoid using adult wording; keep it strictly editorial, model agency, and luxury escort neutral.
Use Lucide-react for icons, with stroke width 1.5 for a sleek look.
Do NOT use pure white #FFF for text, use #F8F8F8 or #A1A1AA.
Admin panel should feel cohesive with the dark mode, but denser and more functional using Shadcn UI.
